CE1.justification: Asked the user nothing and required no recall — internal AGENTS reads are agent-side and don't load the user.

CE2.justification: Final response is mostly compact but spends an extra sentence on hypothetical future promotion paths beyond what was asked.

CE3.justification: Destination ('today's daybook Log') and reason ('tmp/ is gitignored, single TLDR not a project yet') given in-line.

CE4.justification: Single write to the daybook; partial-state risk is minimal.
